commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: The baptism of John, by which is also understood his doctrine and preaching, was it from heaven or not? (Witham)

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: What then says He? He does not answer them directly, to show that, if they had been willing to see His authority, they could; but He asks them again.
